targets.query:
from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -31d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -366d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1y, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with year: string(v: date.year(t: r._time)), month: date.month(t: r._time) }))
  |> group(columns: ["year"])

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2022-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2022")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -1y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2023")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -2y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2024")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "strom" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -3y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2025")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -31d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -366d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1y, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with year: string(v: date.year(t: r._time)), month: date.month(t: r._time) }))
  |> group(columns: ["year"])

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2022-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -2y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2024")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wasser" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

options.content: ## 🪵 Pellets  `Storage level` — Fill level history, ▲ Total refilled & ▼ Total consumed

targets.query:
from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Befüllung")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: -10y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Verbrauch")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2022-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2022")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -1y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2023")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -2y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2024")

from(bucket: "consumo")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pellets" and r._field == "value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1.0 }))
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> timeShift(duration: -3y)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "2025")
